message:
feat: enable GoReleaser auto-publishing to Homebrew and Scoop

- Add brews section to .goreleaser.yaml:
  - Publishes to Dicklesworthstone/homebrew-tap
  - Uses Formula/ directory (not Casks)
  - Includes description, license, install, test, and caveats
- Add scoops section to .goreleaser.yaml:
  - Publishes to Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket
  - Windows 64-bit support
- Update release.yml workflow:
  - Pass HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN to GoReleaser
  - This token needs repo write scope for homebrew-tap and scoop-bucket

Note: Requires HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN secret to be configured in this repo
with write access to both tap repositories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,3 +26,6 @@ jobs:
           args: release --clean
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          # Token with write access to homebrew-tap and scoop-bucket repos
+          # Set this as a repository secret with repo scope
+          HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}

@@ -36,3 +36,40 @@ changelog:
     exclude:
       - '^docs:'
       - '^test:'
+
+# Homebrew tap publishing
+brews:
+  - name: bv
+    repository:
+      owner: Dicklesworthstone
+      name: homebrew-tap
+      branch: main
+      token: "{{ .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}"
+    directory: Formula
+    homepage: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer
+    description: "Graph-aware task management TUI for beads projects"
+    license: "MIT"
+    install: |
+      bin.install "bv"
+    test: |
+      system "#{bin}/bv", "--version"
+    caveats: |
+      To get started with bv:
+        1. Initialize beads in your project: bd init
+        2. Launch the TUI: bv
+
+      For AI agent integration, use --robot-* flags:
+        bv --robot-triage     # Get prioritized recommendations
+        bv --robot-next       # Get single next action
+
+# Scoop bucket publishing
+scoops:
+  - name: bv
+    repository:
+      owner: Dicklesworthstone
+      name: scoop-bucket
+      branch: main
+      token: "{{ .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}"
+    homepage: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer
+    description: "Graph-aware task management TUI for beads projects"
+    license: MIT
